meta.description: A container for log entries — children in the Kanecta tree are LogItem instances

skills.claude: A Logs item is a container — do not store log entries inline. Instead create LogItem child nodes under this item, one per log line.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_2a4da60e_2832_4fcc_8d98_af3be86e419f" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "name" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_2a4da60e_2832_4fcc_8d98_af3be86e419f" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_2a4da60e28324fcc_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
